description: Ingest Vanta compliance controls (SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, PCI, etc.) into a pandas DataFrame via GET /v1/controls.

asset_name.label: Asset Name
asset_name.description: Name of the Dagster asset to create

resource_name.label: Vanta Resource
resource_name.description: Resource key of a registered vanta_resource

framework.label: Framework
framework.description: Filter by compliance framework (soc2, iso27001, hipaa, pci). Omit for all.

status.label: Status
status.description: Filter by control status (OK, NEEDS_ATTENTION, DEACTIVATED). Omit for all.

limit.label: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of controls to fetch

name: Vanta Controls Ingestion
